text:
4 things you need to know about a Threads account that grows itself:

1. The official Meta API is the only safe route — no browser bots, no ban risk.
2. GitHub Actions + free AI APIs = $0/month. No SaaS, no subscription creep.
3. It reads its own analytics every day and writes better posts tomorrow — no manual tweaking.
4. Tokens auto-refresh. You set it up once and forget it.

Comment 'AUTO' and I'll send you the details
